evals.prompt: My BigQuery query scans 1TB of data even though I filter on user_id. The table is huge. Why is it scanning so much?
Can I cluster a BigQuery table on a FLOAT64 column?
expected_topics: allowed types: STRING, INT64, DATE, TIMESTAMP, BOOL, NUMERIC, BIGNUMERIC, DATETIME, GEOGRAPHY, RANGE

evals.prompt: Why is SELECT * more expensive than selecting specific columns in BigQuery? In Postgres it doesn't matter that much.
expected_topics: BigQuery reads only requested column blocks

evals.prompt: If I add LIMIT 100 to a SELECT * query in BigQuery, will it reduce the cost?
expected_topics: LIMIT does not reduce bytes scanned

evals.prompt: We have a dashboard that runs the same expensive aggregation query every 5 minutes. Should we use a materialized view?
expected_topics: query cost × run count > refresh cost

evals.prompt: I have a JOIN between a 5 billion row table and a 10,000 row lookup table. What's the right way to write this?
My query plan shows computeMsMax is 10x higher than computeMsAvg on one stage. What does that mean?
expected_topics: one worker doing most of the work

evals.prompt: I backfilled some 2-year-old partitions to fix a few rows. My storage bill jumped. Why?
How do I prevent analysts on my team from accidentally scanning the entire 50TB events table?
I have audit logs from 3 years ago. We never read them but legal requires us to keep them for 7 years. Which storage class should I use?
Our logs bucket grows by 500GB/month and we keep everything forever. How can we cap costs without manual cleanup?
I enabled object versioning on a bucket where files are overwritten daily. Now storage cost is 6x higher than before. What happened?
expected_topics: lifecycle rule to clean old versions

evals.prompt: My BigQuery is in europe-west1 but my source bucket is in US multi-region. Queries are slow and the bill is high. Why?
How do I optimize my React component re-renders?
I'm building a Dataflow pipeline that writes to BigQuery. What should I optimize?
